name: Mansion #28
description: Batn al-Hut, 'The Belly of the Fish,' ruled by Venus in her most mystical aspect, represents the womb of cosmic rebirth and spiritual gestation. The final mansion before the cycle begins anew, it is a time of inner reflection and preparation for new beginnings. Beta Andromedae marks the belly of the great fish where souls prepare for their next journey. The artwork renders this cosmic womb in Venus' deep ocean-green palette, with spiraling geometric matrices representing the sacred space of death, rebirth, and eternal return.

attributes.value: Spiritual reflection, preparation, inner work, transitions, endings and beginnings
